    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Jost:wght@400;500;600&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,600;1,600&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --brand-sand: #e8c0a1;
            --brand-sand-light: #f2d9c7;
            --brand-sand-dark: #d4a882;
            --brand-mint: #e6f3f0;
            --brand-mint-dark: #c9e4de;
            --brand-navy: #1a2a2c;
            --brand-navy-light: #2a3a3c;
            --brand-mauve: #dacad2;
            --neutral-50: #fafafa;
            --neutral-100: #f5f5f5;
            --neutral-200: #e5e5e5;
            --neutral-300: #d9d9d9;
            --neutral-600: #555969;
            --neutral-800: #1e2028;
            --neutral-900: #171717;
            --font-lora: 'Lora', Georgia, serif;
            --font-jost: 'Jost', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            --bg-body: var(--neutral-50);
            --bg-card: #ffffff;
            --border-card: var(--neutral-200);
            --text-main: var(--neutral-600);
            --text-heading: var(--brand-navy);
            --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.15);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            :root {
                --bg-body: var(--neutral-900);
                --bg-card: var(--brand-navy);
                --border-card: var(--brand-navy-light);
                --text-main: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
                --text-heading: #ffffff;
                --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.1);
                --neutral-100: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        html,
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            color: var(--text-main);
            line-height: 1.6;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            padding: 16px;
        }

        .adeu-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .navbar {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            position: relative;
        }

        .logo-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .nav-title {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            max-width: 40%;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .nav-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            flex: 1;
        }

        #copy-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #copy-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        #open-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #open-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #copy-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
            #open-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        .logo-container svg {
            max-width: 80px;
            height: auto;
        }

        .logo-container svg path,
        .logo-container svg rect,
        .logo-container svg polygon,
        .logo-container svg circle {
            transition: fill 0.2s ease;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {

            .logo-container svg path,
            .logo-container svg rect,
            .logo-container svg polygon,
            .logo-container svg circle,
            .logo-container svg {
                fill: #ffffff !important;
            }
        }

        .content-wrapper {
            position: relative;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background-color: var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #app {
            padding: 32px;
            display: flow-root;
        }

        .fade-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 80px;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), var(--bg-card));
            pointer-events: none;
            display: none;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .fade-overlay {
                background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(26, 42, 44, 0), var(--bg-card));
            }
        }

        .toggle-container {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: none;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
        }

        #toggle-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #toggle-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #toggle-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        #toggle-icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        h1,
        h2,
        h3,
        h4 {
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 1.5em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 2.25rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            padding-bottom: 0.3em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.75rem;
        }

        h3 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

        a {
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            text-decoration: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: border 0.2s ease;
        }

        a:hover {
            border-bottom-color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
        }

        strong {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
        }

        ul,
        ol {
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        li {
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        blockquote {
            border-left: 4px solid var(--brand-sand);
            padding: 12px 20px;
            margin: 24px 0;
            color: var(--text-main);
            background: var(--bg-blockquote);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        code {
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            background: var(--neutral-100);
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        pre code {
            display: block;
            padding: 16px;
            background: var(--neutral-900);
            color: #e5e5e5;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        .skeleton {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--neutral-100) 25%, var(--border-card) 50%, var(--neutral-100) 75%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: skeleton 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        @keyframes skeleton {
            0% {
                background-position: 200% 0;
            }

            100% {
                background-position: -200% 0;
            }
        }

        .alert {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            background-color: #fef2f2;
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            color: #991b1b;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .alert {
                background-color: rgba(127, 29, 29, 0.2);
                border-color: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.3);
                color: #fca5a5;
            }
        }

        .alert-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1.1em;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
        }

        .alert-body {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 0.95em;
        }

        .alert-details {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-break: break-all;
            margin-top: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
    </style>

</svg>

            </div>

            <div class="nav-title" id="nav-title"></div>

            <div class="nav-actions">
                <button id="copy-btn" title="Copy Markdown">
                    <svg id="copy-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                        <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="copy-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
                <button id="open-btn" title="Open in Native App">
                    <svg id="open-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" 
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path>
                        <polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"></polyline>
                        <line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"></line>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="open-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </nav>

        <div class="content-wrapper" id="content-wrapper">
            <div id="app">
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 36px; width: 40%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 95%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 90%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 80%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="fade-overlay" id="fade-overlay"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="toggle-container" id="toggle-container">
            <button id="toggle-btn">
                <span id="toggle-text">Show More</span>
                <svg id="toggle-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="transform: rotate(0deg);">
                    <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const appDiv = document.getElementById('app');
        const INIT_ID = 1;
        let isExpanded = false; // START COLLAPSED BY DEFAULT!

        let rawMarkdownText = "";
        let currentFilePath = null;
        const navTitle = document.getElementById('nav-title');
        const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
        const copyIcon = document.getElementById('copy-icon');
        const copyText = document.getElementById('copy-text');
        const openBtn = document.getElementById('open-btn');
        const openText = document.getElementById('open-text');

        function fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(text) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const textArea = document.createElement("textarea");
                textArea.value = text;
                textArea.style.top = "0";
                textArea.style.left = "0";
                textArea.style.position = "fixed";
                textArea.style.opacity = "0";

                document.body.appendChild(textArea);
                textArea.focus();
                textArea.select();

                try {
                    const successful = document.execCommand('copy');
                    if (successful) {
                        resolve();
                    } else {
                        reject(new Error("execCommand returned false"));
                    }
                } catch (err) {
                    reject(err);
                } finally {
                    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                }
            });
        }

        copyBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
            try {
                if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
                    try {
                        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(rawMarkdownText);
                    } catch (e) {
                        await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                    }
                } else {
                    await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                }

                const originalSvg = copyIcon.innerHTML;
                copyIcon.innerHTML = `<polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>`;

                copyText.textContent = "Copied!";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.style.color = "#10b981";

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyIcon.innerHTML = originalSvg;
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.style.color = "";
                }, 2000);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Failed to copy text: ', err);
                copyText.textContent = "Failed";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.title = err.toString();

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.title = "Copy Markdown";
                }, 3000);
            }
        });

        openBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!currentFilePath) return;

            const reqId = Date.now();

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                id: reqId,
                method: "tools/call",
                params: {
                    name: "open_local_file",
                    arguments: {
                        file_path: currentFilePath
                    }
                }
            }, "*");

            openText.textContent = "Opening...";
            openText.style.display = "inline";
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                openText.style.display = "none";
                openText.textContent = "";
            }, 2000);
        });

        function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
            return (unsafe || "").toString()
                .replace(/&/g, "&")
                .replace(/</g, "<")
                .replace(/>/g, ">")
                .replace(/"/g, """)
                .replace(/'/g, "'");
        }

        function showError(title, message, details = null) {
            let html = `
            <div class="alert">
                <div class="alert-title">
                    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"></line></svg>
                    ${escapeHtml(title)}
                </div>
                <div class="alert-body">${escapeHtml(message)}</div>
            `;
            if (details) {
                html += `<div class="alert-details">${escapeHtml(details)}</div>`;
            }
            html += `</div>`;
            appDiv.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function checkCollapsible() {
            const wrapper = document.getElementById('content-wrapper');
            const toggleContainer = document.getElementById('toggle-container');
            const fadeOverlay = document.getElementById('fade-overlay');
            const toggleIcon = document.getElementById('toggle-icon');
            const toggleText = document.getElementById('toggle-text');

            // 1. If no markdown, we are showing the skeleton. Do not collapse!
            if (!rawMarkdownText) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                triggerResize();
                return;
            }

            // 2. Data is loaded
            const realHeight = appDiv.scrollHeight;
            const COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD = 300;
            const COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = 150;
            const EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT = 500;

            if (realHeight > COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                if (isExpanded) {
                    // Open view! Scroll inside max 500px window
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'auto';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show Less';
                } else {
                    // Collapsed View
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = COLLAPSED_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'hidden';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'block';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show More';
                }
            } else {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
            }

            triggerResize();
        }

        document.getElementById('toggle-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            isExpanded = !isExpanded;
            checkCollapsible();
        });

        function triggerResize() {
            // Measure the exact unconstrained height of the outer card
            const card = document.querySelector('.adeu-card');
            const containerChrome = 34; // 16px padding top/bottom + 2px borders

            const requestedHeight = card.offsetHeight + containerChrome;

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                params: { height: Math.ceil(requestedHeight), width: 600 }
            }, "*");
        }

        window.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
            try {
                if (!event.data || event.data.jsonrpc !== "2.0") return;
                const msg = event.data;

                if (msg.id === INIT_ID) {
                    window.parent.postMessage({
                        jsonrpc: "2.0",
                        method: "ui/notifications/initialized",
                        params: {}
                    }, "*");
                    return;
                }

                if (msg.method === "ui/notifications/tool-result") {
                    if (window.__MARKED_ERROR || typeof marked === 'undefined') {
                        showError("Missing Dependency", "The Markdown renderer failed to load.", window.__MARKED_ERROR || "marked is undefined.");
                        return;
                    }

                    const result = msg.params;

                    // If the state is pending, or no markdown is returned, completely hide the UI
                    if (!result || !result.structuredContent || result.structuredContent.status === "pending" || !result.structuredContent.markdown) {
                        document.documentElement.style.display = 'none';
                        window.parent.postMessage({
                            jsonrpc: "2.0",
                            method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                            params: { height: 0, width: 0 }
                        }, "*");
                        return;
                    }

                    // Render Markdown
                    rawMarkdownText = result.structuredContent.markdown;
                    if (result.structuredContent.file_path) {
                        currentFilePath = result.structuredContent.file_path;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'flex';
                    } else {
                        currentFilePath = null;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                    appDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(rawMarkdownText);
                    copyBtn.style.display = 'flex';

                    if (result.structuredContent.title) {
                        navTitle.textContent = result.structuredContent.title;
                        navTitle.title = result.structuredContent.title;
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                showError("Rendering Engine Error", "An unexpected error occurred.", error.toString() + "\n" + error.stack);
            }
        });

        const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => {
            checkCollapsible();
        });
        observer.observe(appDiv);

        window.parent.postMessage({
            jsonrpc: "2.0",
            id: INIT_ID,
            method: "ui/initialize",
            params: {
                appInfo: { name: "Adeu Markdown UI", version: "1.1.0" },
                appCapabilities: {},
                protocolVersion: "2025-11-21"
            }
        }, "*");
    </script>
</body>

</html>

arguments.content:
# PEMBERTON RFQ — TOP 3 REDLINE TARGETS
## 5-Minute Pitch to Commercial Sponsor

**Goal:** Secure walk-away threshold authority before bid submission (deadline: 10 June 2026)

---

## TARGET #1: INDEMNITY CAP
### *Minute 1*

**THE PROBLEM**

Pemberton's contract says you must indemnify them for **unlimited losses** on defects, IP claims, and legal breaches. No ceiling. Survives termination forever.

**Concrete example:**
- You ship a batch of cutting tools that fail prematurely
- Pemberton's customer sues Pemberton for £5m in lost production
- Pemberton's insurance pays £5m. You still owe Pemberton the full £5m under the indemnity.
- Your 3-year profit is ~£4.4m
- **Result: You're insolvent.**

**Your liability cap (12 months' fees) doesn't apply** because indemnity is carved out. This is asymmetric and irrational.

**THE ASK**

Cap the indemnity at **12 months' fees** (same as your general liability cap). If Pemberton insists on higher protection, cap it at **18 months' fees** and impose a **3-year survival limit** (indemnity expires 3 years after termination, not indefinitely).

**WHY THIS MATTERS**

- Indemnity is tail risk. You cannot price for unlimited exposure.
- **Expected cost:** £500k–£750k over 3 years (13–17% of your profit). One bad event wipes you out.
- A cap is standard in commercial supply agreements. Pemberton's "unlimited" language is buyer-hostile junk.

**WHAT YOU'LL SAY TO PEMBERTON**

> "Supplier is willing to indemnify for breaches and defects up to 12 months of fees. This is comparable to our general liability cap and is standard in the industry. However, unlimited indemnity on a £18.4m/year supply contract is uninsurable and economically irrational for Supplier. We need to cap this at 12 months to proceed."

**WALK-AWAY?** Yes. If Pemberton won't budge, either decline the bid or add **3–5 percentage points to your margin** to cover the indemnity risk. But pricing alone doesn't fix the tail-risk problem.

---

## TARGET #2: TERMINATION FOR CONVENIENCE + MINIMUM TAKE
### *Minute 2*

**THE PROBLEM**

Pemberton can terminate **any time with 30 days' notice** for any reason. No penalty. You get reimbursement of only 5% of work-in-progress costs.

On a £18.4m/year framework with fixed sales & ops overhead, this turns a 3-year deal into a rolling 30-day agreement. Your break-even is at risk.

**Concrete example:**
- You hire 5 FTE sales/ops staff dedicated to Pemberton.
- You build supply-chain relationships, stock components, and negotiate sub-supplier contracts.
- Pemberton gets 40% of its MRO supply from you in Year 1 (£7.4m).
- On day 400 (partway through Year 2), Pemberton terminates for convenience.
- You must wind down 5 FTE (severance, benefits), liquidate inventory (distressed pricing), and break sub-supplier contracts (penalties).
- Your Year 1 profit (~£1.5m, 20% margin) gets eaten by Year 2 winding costs (~£800k).
- **Result: Deal margin collapses from 20% to 12%.**

**THE ASK**

Pemberton can still terminate for convenience, but you need **"wind-down compensation"** protecting break-even overhead:

**Option A (Preferred):**
- Buyer commits to a **minimum annual take:** No less than £12m/year of Pemberton's forecasted spend (£18.4m). If Pemberton's actual spend falls below £12m in any year, Supplier may increase prices by 5% on remaining volumes to recover fixed costs.

**Option B (Fallback):**
- On termination for convenience, Supplier is entitled to **transition costs:** 10% of the average monthly invoice value (averaged over prior 12 months), payable as a one-time fee at termination date. This covers headcount wind-down, inventory liquidation, and sub-supplier penalties.

**WHY THIS MATTERS**

- Without a volume floor or transition fee, your model assumes Pemberton stays for 3 years.
- If Pemberton terminates early, your fixed costs (staff, systems, supply-chain setup) blow a hole in profitability.
- A volume floor or transition fee is fair: it protects you if Pemberton abandons you, and it incentivizes Pemberton to commit to volume (mutual accountability).

**WHAT YOU'LL SAY TO PEMBERTON**

> "We're comfortable with termination for convenience, but given the operational setup required for this framework (5 dedicated staff, supply-chain integration, component stocking), we need either a volume floor (minimum £12m annual take) or a transition-cost fee if you exit. This is standard in 3-year supply arrangements and protects both parties."

**WALK-AWAY?** Yes. If Pemberton refuses both options, you're pricing this deal at +3–5% margin just to account for early-termination risk. But that's not enough. Push hard here.

---

## TARGET #3: FOREGROUND IP ASSIGNMENT + BACKGROUND IP CARVE-OUT
### *Minute 3*

**THE PROBLEM**

The contract says **any improvements or modifications** you develop "in connection with" this deal vest **absolutely in Pemberton.** You get nothing.

This includes:
- Custom jigs or fixtures you build to fulfill Pemberton's orders efficiently
- Process improvements or workflow optimizations you develop while supplying them
- Documentation, methodologies, or best-practice guides you create
- Joint developments with sub-suppliers

Pemberton can then use these improvements with other suppliers or license them to competitors.

**Concrete example:**
- You develop a custom packing system to reduce shipping damage on delicate tools (saves Pemberton 2% in returns).
- You optimize your picking/staging process for Pemberton's high-volume, low-margin product mix (saves you 5% in fulfillment costs).
- Pemberton terminates the deal in Year 2.
- You've invested £200k in these improvements. Pemberton owns them and can now share them with your competitor.
- **Result: Competitive advantage gone. Plus you've funded Pemberton's cost-reduction for the next supplier.**

**THE ASK**

Redline clause 9.2 to carve out **Background IP + pre-existing improvements:**

**Current language (Pemberton's):**
> "All Foreground IP — including any modifications, improvements, derivatives, or jointly developed materials arising in connection with this Agreement — shall vest in Buyer absolutely on creation."

**Your proposed language:**
> "Foreground IP limited to items specifically ordered by Buyer in writing shall vest in Buyer. Supplier retains ownership of (i) any Background IP or pre-existing improvements, methodologies, tools, or processes that Supplier owned or developed prior to this Agreement, or (ii) any improvements, optimizations, or methodologies that Supplier develops on its own time and resources and that are not specifically created at Buyer's direction. Supplier grants Buyer a limited, non-sublicensable license to use Supplier's Background IP solely to the extent necessary to use and maintain the Goods during the Term."

**Translation:** Pemberton gets ownership of custom deliverables they pay for. You keep your methodologies, process improvements, and tooling.

**WHY THIS MATTERS**

- Your competitive advantage is in your supply-chain operations, not in individual orders.
- If you lose ownership of your process improvements every time you supply, you have no incentive to innovate or optimize.
- Pemberton doesn't need absolute ownership of your internal methodologies; they just need the goods to work.
- A limited license (use it, but don't share it) is a fair compromise.

**WHAT YOU'LL SAY TO PEMBERTON**

> "We're happy for Pemberton to own custom tooling or deliverables you've specifically paid us to develop. However, our competitive advantage lies in our supply-chain operations and process improvements. We need to retain ownership of our pre-existing methodologies and innovations we develop on our own time. We'll grant you a license to use our Background IP exclusively within your orders — but you can't share it with other suppliers. This protects both our innovation and ensures we're committed to continuous improvement for you."

**WALK-AWAY?** Moderate. If Pemberton insists on absolute assignment, you can compromise: agree to assignment of custom deliverables (jigs, fixtures, documentation), but retain ownership of process methodologies and best-practice playbooks. You're fighting for breathing room, not blocking the deal.

---

## SUMMARY: THREE ASKS, THREE REASONS

| **Target** | **Current Language** | **Your Ask** | **Why It Matters** | **Walk-Away?** |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Indemnity** | Unlimited, indefinite | Cap at 12–18 mo; 3-yr tail | Tail risk eats 13–17% of profit; one bad event = insolvency | **YES** |
| **Termination** | 30 days, 5% WIP only | Min take £12m/yr OR 10% transition fee | Early exit kills fixed-cost recovery; need volume floor or exit fee | **YES** |
| **Foreground IP** | Absolute assignment to Buyer | Carve out Background IP + pre-existing methods | Lose competitive advantage if all innovations vest in Buyer | **Moderate** |

---

## DECISION TREE FOR SPONSOR

**Do we bid on this deal?**

```
┌─ Can we get Pemberton to cap indemnity + add termination protection?
│
├─ YES (one or both conceded)
│  └─> PROCEED. Bid at normal 8–10% margin.
│
├─ NO (Pemberton refuses both)
│  ├─ Can we live with unlimited indemnity + roll-on-termination risk if we price at +8–10%?
│  │  ├─ YES → Bid at 13–15% margin (covers tail risk + termination risk)
│  │  └─ NO → DECLINE. Deal is economically irrational.
│  │
│  └─ DECISION POINT: This is your call as commercial sponsor.
│     Legal has flagged the risk. You decide if margin compensates for it.
```

---

## NEXT STEPS

1. **Approve walk-away threshold:** What is your red line?
   - Indemnity cap: 12 months? 18 months? Unlimited unacceptable?
   - Termination: Volume floor or transition fee required?
   - IP: Carve out Background IP, or acceptable to lose everything?

2. **Delegate redline drafting:** Once approved, Legal will prepare marked-up MSA with specific language.

3. **Clarification call prep:** We'll brief you on fallback positions if Pemberton pushes back.

4. **Bid submission:** Redlined MSA + cover memo explaining commercial rationale.

---

## FINAL WORD

**This deal has three structural flaws** (unlimited indemnity, termination-at-will, IP assignment) **that blow a hole in your economics.** Pemberton's RFQ is deliberately buyer-hostile to compress supplier margin and shift risk.

You can negotiate this deal into shape. But you need to **pick your battles** and **set walk-away thresholds now.** 

The indemnity cap is non-negotiable. The termination protection is essential. The IP carve-out is important but negotiable.

**Your move.**
